query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority,
  pvg.digestSafe,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.id END) as send_ready_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN projectValidationGates pvg ON pvg.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS')
  AND p.suppressed = 0
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, pvg.digestSafe
HAVING pvg.digestSafe = 1 OR (send_ready_count > 0 AND pvg.digestSafe IS NULL)
ORDER BY pvg.digestSafe DESC, send_ready_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

  pvg.digestSafe,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.id END) as send_ready_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN projectValidationGates pvg ON pvg.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS')
  AND p.suppressed = 0
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, pvg.digestSafe
HAVING pvg.digestSafe = 1 OR (send_ready_count > 0 AND pvg.digestSafe IS NULL)
ORDER BY pvg.digestSafe DESC, send_ready_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
